summary: Comprehensive testing of video upload and automatic MP4 conversion feature for Bull & Bear Trading Academy. All 7 backend API tests passed and all frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test video files using ffmpeg: /tmp/test_video.mp4 and /tmp/test_video_original.mov
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video upload feature fully tested and working. MOV→MP4 conversion verified via ffmpeg. All uploaded videos now show as MP4 in Video Manager (12 videos). Video Manager shows 'All videos are in MP4 format ✓'.

backend_video_upload_endpoint.POST /api/upload/video with MOV: WORKING - Returns {url, filename, converted: true, original_format: .mov}
backend_video_upload_endpoint.POST /api/upload/video with invalid .txt: WORKING - Returns 400 error with allowed file types message

frontend_admin_panel.courses_tab: WORKING - Shows Add New Course form
frontend_admin_panel.conversion_info_text: WORKING - Shows 'MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM accepted. Non-MP4 files auto-convert to MP4.'
frontend_admin_panel.uploading_spinner_message: WORKING - Shows 'Uploading & converting video (may take a few minutes)...' during upload

course_form_fields.title: WORKING
course_form_fields.category: WORKING (dropdown: beginner, advanced, psychology, risk-management, technical-analysis)

frontend_admin_panel.video_manager_tab: WORKING - Shows 12 MP4 videos, 0 videos needing conversion
